case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O VS RAPPOSELLI STEVEN R/O

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAPPOSELLI STEVEN R/O $1,189.12 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RAPPOSELLI STEVEN R/O HEARING SET FOR SEP-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAPPOSELLI STEVEN R/O
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF SEP-03-1992, GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RAPPOSELLI STEVEN R/O
